popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Mary Bruce (c. 1282 – 1323) was the younger sister of Robert the Bruce, King of Scots. During the First War of Scottish Independence, she was captured by the English and imprisoned in a cage at Roxbur …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Brus於1279年出生在蘇格蘭費伏卡里克時，她的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale36歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick25歲。她於1308年與William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan在蘇格蘭洛-爾結婚。她去世於1323年9月22日在蘇格蘭洛-爾費亞享年44歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Brus于1279年出生在苏格兰費伏卡里克时，她的父亲Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale36岁，母亲Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick25岁。她于1308年与William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan在苏格兰洛-爾结婚。她去世于1323年9月22日在苏格兰洛-爾費亞享年44岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Brus was born in 1279, in Carrick, Fife, Scotland, her father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 36 and her mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was 25. She married William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan in 1308, in Ross-shire, Scotland. She died on 22 September 1323, in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Brus est née en 1279, à Carrick, Fife, Écosse, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan en 1308, à Ross-shire, Écosse. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1323, à Fearn, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Brus 1279 in Carrick, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick 25. Sie hat 1308 in Ross-shire, Scotland William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan geheiratet. Sie starb am 22. September 1323 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Brus è nata il nel 1279 nel Carrick, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan nel 1308, nel Ross-shire, Scotland. Morì il 22 settembre 1323, nel Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Brusが1279年にスコットランドフィフカーリックで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは36歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは25歳であった。1308年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアでWilliam 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowanと結婚した。彼女は1323年9月22日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアフエアルンで44歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Brus(이)가 1279년 스컷랜드 피프 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1308년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1323년 9월 22일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 피른에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

mn.Roxburgh Castle, Kelso, Roxburghshire, S: Kelso, Siorrachd Rosbruig, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Brus nasceu em 1279, em Carrick, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan em 1308, em Ross-shire, Scotland. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1323, em Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Brus родилась в 1279 г. в местности каррикк, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan в 1308 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия. Она умерла 22 сентября 1323 г. в местности фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Brus nació en 1279, en Carrick, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William 4th Earl of Ross 2nd Laird of Balnagowan en 1308, en Ross-shire, Scotland. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1323, en Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.
